name: Calgary Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat from the roast.
2. Rub dry mustard and salt into the surface of the meat.
3. Place the roast in a lightly greased, oven-proof dish.
4. Top with chopped onion.
5. Combine tomato sauce, vinegar, thyme, and pepper in a bowl.
6. Pour the mixture over the roast.
7. Cover tightly and bake at 325°F for 3 hours until the meat is tender.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
